parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT (value->>'lastTelegramUpdateId')::bigint FROM bot_state WHERE key = 'telegram'), 0) AS last_telegram_update_id, COALESCE((SELECT value FROM bot_state WHERE key = 'telegram'), '{}'::jsonb) AS bot_state;
